name: LREF_LG_XT1226001_123
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LREF_LG_XT1226001_123 @newLRef INTEGER OUTPUT AS
  DECLARE @fnd       SMALLINT
  DECLARE @firstVal  INT
  DECLARE @secondVal INT

SELECT @newLRef = 0
IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID('LG_XT1226001_123SEQ'))

 BEGIN SELECT @fnd = 0

       WHILE @fnd = 0
         BEGIN SELECT @firstVal = LASTLREF FROM LG_XT1226001_123SEQ WHERE ID = 1

               UPDATE LG_XT1226001_123SEQ  SET LASTLREF = LASTLREF + 1 WHERE ID = 1

               SELECT @secondVal = LASTLREF FROM LG_XT1226001_123SEQ  WHERE ID = 1

               IF (@secondVal-@firstVal) = 1
                 SELECT @fnd = 1
         END

       SELECT @newLRef = @secondVal

 END
